name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Bamboo 1947 series mini bamboo handbag. The Gucci Bamboo 1947 series handbags ingeniously incorporate unique designs such as handcrafted bamboo handles, buckles, and mirrors (encased in leather), showcasing the brand's classic style and exquisite craftsmanship. Visit designated stores or experience exclusive selection with the assistance of a client advisor. Red patent leather, gold-tone bamboo hardware, leather lining, interior: card pocket, web strap length: 81-125cm; leather strap length: 100-114cm, handle height: 8cm, web strap height: 41-64cm; leather strap height: 50-57cm, bamboo buckle closure, weight: approx. 0.445kg.

Model: 786482.
Dimensions: 17(W) x 12(H) x 7.5cm(D)
